name: Pacific Pipe Public Company Limited
summary: Pacific Pipe Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes steel pipes for construction works primarily in Thailand. It provides round, square, and rectangular pipes, as well as C-shaped, black, galvanized, coated, and lip channel steel pipes; and laboratory testing, steel pipe processing and transportation services. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Phra Samut Chedi, Thailand.
